items.name_en: Latest best-selling vintage Prada bag, a must-have for fashionistas. My favorite Prada bag to carry. It's versatile and has great capacity, so I use it most often. Compared to others, this one has more capacity but is a more feminine and versatile style KK370 size.

items.name_en: LE 37 Bucket Bag Small_
items.name_cn:
LE 37 Bucket Bag Small_
New Trendy Bucket Bag with Handle_ New shape, made of Italian calfskin. The clean, structured silhouette looks structured yet not too sharp. Features a metal foot at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. Overall, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic elegant and very modern!
Size: 17×20×13cm
Model: 749036

items.name_en: LE 87 Lambskin Metal Clasp Bag
items.name_cn:
LE 87 Lambskin Metal Clasp Bag
Full of vintage vibes, made of lambskin with a fine texture. Features a double-sided zipper, F R A M E handbag design, paired with diamond quilting and metal Le CASSANDRE! The unique shape adds more stylish details!
Equipped with a chain top handle that can be folded down, and a detachable shoulder strap! Suitable for day and night!
Don't miss out 😎
Style: 754001
Folded size: 26x13x5cm
Normal size: 26x26.5x5cm

items.name_en: LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Suede
items.name_cn:
LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Suede
The BABY version of the fine suede deer leather handbag. Leather buckle closure. This handbag has a soft structure, paired with a matching suede lining, lightweight and graceful. It features an internal card holder and comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, suitable for both hand-carry and shoulder-wear~ For a light and small bag in summer, this is the top choice!
Size: 15×16x7CM
Style: 809461
